summary: M7 strategic terrain recovery planning is closed after PR #235 entered origin/main. The project has accepted ADR-011 and the downstream DRAFT strategic terrain task chain as the replacement direction after the product-owner rejection of the current map drawing and spatial indexing model.

tests_run.result: PR Gate passed: Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact and Quality, Web, and Browser Smoke both succeeded.
PR #235 merged; local main fast-forwarded to origin/main 2ee0a3282ebb6cfbf07d34d57e476f60eea46eb7.

decisions.decision: Close M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-RECOVERY-001 after accepted planning package entered origin/main through PR #235.
Promote M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-SCHEMA-001 to READY as the next sequential strategic terrain recovery task.
M7 content lock remains unapproved and M7 exit validation remains disabled until the full strategic terrain recovery chain validates and the product owner reconsiders content lock.

risks.summary: The next work replaces the rejected map drawing and spatial index across schema, content, renderer, AI/player reasons, and validation.
risks.mitigation: Proceed through the accepted sequential task chain with independent systems and QA review.

requested_action: Start M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-SCHEMA-001 as the next READY task on a new branch/worktree with systems_architect owner and independent qa_reviewer.
